'''ngafoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachsmithing|coachsmithing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachsmithing|coachsmithing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngafoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæfeteth|ngæfeteth]] || [[word:ngæfetej|ngæfetej]] || [[word:ngæfetesh|ngæfetesh]] || [[word:ngæfete|ngæfete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafofototh|ngafofototh]] || [[word:ngafofotoj|ngafofotoj]] || [[word:ngafofotosh|ngafofotosh]] || [[word:ngafofoto|ngafofoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafototh|ngafototh]] || [[word:ngafotoj|ngafotoj]] || [[word:ngafotosh|ngafotosh]] || [[word:ngafoto|ngafoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafoftoth|ngafoftoth]] || [[word:ngafoftoj|ngafoftoj]] || [[word:ngafoftosh|ngafoftosh]] || [[word:ngafoftof|ngafoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngafototho|ngafototho]] || [[word:ngafotojo|ngafotojo]] || [[word:ngafotosho|ngafotosho]] || [[word:ngafotoko|ngafotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngafototh|ngafototh]] || [[word:ngafotoj|ngafotoj]] || [[word:ngafotosh|ngafotosh]] || [[word:ngafoto|ngafoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngafotothol|ngafotothol]] || [[word:ngafotojol|ngafotojol]] || [[word:ngafotoshol|ngafotoshol]] || [[word:ngafotokol|ngafotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngafotothotho|ngafotothotho]] || [[word:ngafotojojo|ngafotojojo]] || [[word:ngafotoshosho|ngafotoshosho]] || [[word:ngafotoko|ngafotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngafotothon|ngafotothon]] || [[word:ngafotojon|ngafotojon]] || [[word:ngafotoshon|ngafotoshon]] || [[word:ngafotokon|ngafotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngafotothoro|ngafotothoro]] || [[word:ngafotojoro|ngafotojoro]] || [[word:ngafotoshoro|ngafotoshoro]] || [[word:ngafotokoro|ngafotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
